description: Docker Network DHCP Plugin - Allocates IP addresses via DHCP to containers

mounts.name: docker-socket
mounts.description: Docker daemon API socket. Read-write because Unix domain sockets require bidirectional access for the client/daemon protocol.

mounts.name: state
mounts.description: Plugin state directory for DHCP endpoint persistence

env.name: DOCKER_NETWORK_DHCP_LOG_LEVEL
env.description: Log verbosity: trace, debug, info, warn, error

env.name: DOCKER_NETWORK_DHCP_AWAIT_TIMEOUT
env.description: Timeout waiting for container and interface readiness (e.g. 10s, 30s)

env.name: DOCKER_NETWORK_DHCP_LOGFILE
env.description: Log file path. Empty (default) = stderr, captured by 'docker plugin logs'. Set to a path inside a mounted volume only if you need persistent logs separate from Docker's plugin log.
